parameters.content:
## 1. Schedule
Runs every 4 hours and evaluates enabled check-in schedules using UTC date/time.

## 2. Due check
Daily schedules are due every day. Weekly schedules are due when the UTC weekday is in check_in_days and check_in_time has passed.

## 3. Skip rules
Skips clients who already submitted today and skips duplicate check-in reminder notifications.

## 4. Notify client
Creates one notifications row with type = booking_reminder and data.kind = check_in_due.

## 5. Run summary
Returns created, skipped, due, and error counts plus one result item per schedule.

### Implementation note
Uses existing tables only: check_in_schedules, check_in_responses, and notifications. No migration or push delivery in v1.
